column5: Drive Side (DS) & TBA Enable (TBA) & Front Camera Enable (FCE) & Vss Sleep (VSS)
0=DS LeftHand, TBA disabled, FCE network, VSS disabled
column6: 8=DS RightHand, TBA disabled, FCE network, VSS disabled

column5: 1=DS LeftHand, TBA disabled, FCE network, VSS enabled
column6: 9=DS RightHand, TBA disabled, FCE network, VSS enabled

column5: 2=DS LeftHand, TBA disabled, FCE hardwire, VSS disabled
column6: A=DS RightHand, TBA disabled, FCE hardwire, VSS disabled

column5: 3=DS LeftHand, TBA disabled, FCE hardwire, VSS enabled
column6: B=DS RightHand, TBA disabled, FCE hardwire, VSS enabled

column5: 4=DS LeftHand, TBA enabled, FCE network, VSS disabled
column6: C=DS RightHand, TBA enabled, FCE network, VSS disabled

column5: 5=DS LeftHand, TBA enabled, FCE network, VSS enabled
column6: D=DS RightHand, TBA enabled, FCE network, VSS enabled

column5: 6=DS LeftHand, TBA enabled, FCE hardwire, VSS disabled
column6: E=DS RightHand, TBA enabled, FCE hardwire, VSS disabled

column5: 7=DS LeftHand, TBA enabled, FCE hardwire, VSS enabled
column6: F=DS RightHand, TBA enabled, FCE hardwire, VSS enabled

column5: Rear Camera Type (RCT) & Front Camera Type (FCT) & Number of Cameras (NOC)

column6: 8=RCT MegaPixel, FCT VGA, NOC 1 camera
9=RCT MegaPixel, FCT VGA, NOC 2 cameras
A=RCT MegaPixel, FCT VGA, NOC 4 cameras
C=RCT MegaPixel, FCT MegaPixel, NOC 1 camera
D=RCT MegaPixel, FCT MegaPixel, NOC 2 cameras
E=RCT MegaPixel, FCT MegaPixel, NOC 4 cameras

column5: SlaveExists FB (SFB) & SlaveExists FVC (SFVC) & SlaveExists RVC (SRVC)

column6: 8=SFB present, SFVC absent, SRVC absent
A=SFB present, SFVC absent, SRVC present
C=SFB present, SFVC present, SRVC absent
E=SFB present, SFVC present, SRVC present

column5:
Vehicle Type (VT) & Front Overlay Available (FOA) & Remote Cam (RC)
** F150 is type 17, Raptor is type 45 **

column6: B0=VT F150, FOA disabled, RC absent
B1=VT F150, FOA disabled, RC present
B2=VT F150, FOA enabled, RC absent
B3=VT F150, FOA enabled, RC present

column5: Sync APA Fix (SAPA) & Door Ajar Indicator (DAI) & Rear VPA (RVPA)

column6: 8=SAPA on, DAI off, RVPA off
9=SAPA on, DAI off, RVPA on
A=SAPA on, DAI off, RVPA LastKnown
B=SAPA on, DAI off, RVPA FactoryOff
C=SAPA on, DAI on, RVPA off
D=SAPA on, DAI on, RVPA on
E=SAPA on, DAI on, RVPA LastKnown
F=SAPA on, DAI on, RVPA FactoryOff
8=MIC LastKnown, ZL off
9=MIC LastKnown, ZL on
A=MIC LastKnown, ZL LastKnown
B=MIC LastKnown, ZL FactoryOff
C=MIC FactoryOff, ZL off
D=MIC FactoryOff, ZL on
E=MIC FactoryOff, ZL LastKnown
F=MIC FactoryOff, ZL FactoryOff

column5: Raptor Mode (RM) & FB Close Behavior (FBCB) & Front Cam Indicator (FCI) & Tailgage Ajar Indicator (TAI)
0=RM disabled, FBCB Null, FCI disabled, TAI off
column6: 8=RM enabled, FBCB Null, FCI disabled, TAI off

column5: 1=RM disabled, FBCB Null, FCI disabled, TAI on
column6: 9=RM enabled, FBCB Null, FCI disabled, TAI on

column5: 2=RM disabled, FBCB Null, FCI enabled, TAI off
column6: A=RM enabled, FBCB Null, FCI enabled, TAI off

column5: 3=RM disabled, FBCB Null, FCI enabled, TAI on
column6: B=RM enabled, FBCB Null, FCI enabled, TAI on

column5: 4=RM disabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI disabled, TAI off
column6: C=RM enabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI disabled, TAI off

column5: 5=RM disabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI disabled, TAI on
column6: D=RM enabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI disabled, TAI on

column5: 6=RM disabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI enabled, TAI off
column6: E=RM enabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI enabled, TAI off

column5: 7=RM disabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI enabled, TAI on
column6: F=RM enabled, FBCB Neutral, FCI enabled, TAI on
